posts.author: Mygalys (Lepage)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I’m trying to display a Progress bar using formula column.
This formula is request giving a percentage calculated from other column in my portofolio.
I would like to display this percentage (the result of the formula) into a Progress bar.
Actually, only Status entries are used with Progress bar.
I’m waiting on this update for a better display.
Thank you.
Myg

posts.author: JasperDemeurie (Jasper)
posts.cookedHtml:
YES YES YES to this feature request.
I’d love using progress bars on percentages.

I’m tracking marketplace revenues with monthly goals, and revenues.
I update them every few days, and loved to see this visually in a progress bar (current revenue compared to kpi revenue).

I currently use a formula column to show the percentage though, but that’s just not the same as Monday should be able to do.
